{"id":"smallhold-2m5","title":"GitHub Actions CI workflow for build, test, lint","description":"Write .github/workflows/ci.yml. Jobs: (1) fmt + clippy + deny, (2) test (cargo test --all-targets), (3) doc build (RUSTDOCFLAGS='--cfg docsrs -D warnings' cargo +nightly doc). Matrix: stable + MSRV (1.75).

Agent workflow: Spawn a subagent to research current GitHub Actions Rust action versions.

Test discipline: The test job must run with --all-targets so integration tests are included. No --features all shortcuts that bypass feature combinations.

Defensive programming: Cache ~/.cargo and target/ to avoid rebuilding deps. Fail fast on first error.","acceptance_criteria":"CI passes on a clean commit; matrix includes stable and MSRV; doc build uses nightly","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:52Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:25:52Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-2o6","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:25:57Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
